prompt: In my existing API project at debug-sample/, add a new endpoint file for user authentication. I need POST /auth/login (email + password, returns token), POST /auth/register (username, email, password), and POST /auth/logout. Also create the auth-related schemas.

assertions.text: paths/auth.json exists as a standalone OpenAPI document with openapi, info, servers, paths fields
POST /auth/login endpoint exists with email and password in request body schema
POST /auth/register endpoint exists with username, email, and password in request body schema
components/schemas/auth.json exists with auth-related schemas under components.schemas
The openapi version in auth paths file matches the existing project version (3.1.1)
All operationId values use kebab-case naming
Schema names are PascalCase (e.g., LoginRequest, RegisterRequest)
All JSON files are valid parseable JSON
